description: Expert leasehold enfranchisement and management solicitors. We help leaseholders, landlords and managing agents with clear, practical advice.

title: Buying your Freehold  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Buying the freehold of a leasehold property can give you greater control, long-term security and clarity over costs. Whether you own a leasehold flat or leasehold house, there are legal routes available to help you secure the freehold. As members of the Association of Leasehold Enfranchisement Practitioners and The Property Institute, we have recognised experience and practical knowledge to support you through the process with confidence.

title: Extending your Lease  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If your lease is starting to run down, now is the time to act. Letting it drop below 80 years could significantly increase the cost to extend it. We can help you secure a longer lease that protects the value of your home and gives you peace of mind.

title: Ground Rent Issues and Lease Variations  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Ground rent provisions and lease terms that no longer meet modern lender requirements can create real barriers for leaseholders and landlords. Issues such as escalating ground rent or defective lease clauses can affect mortgage ability, value and future sales. We provide clear guidance on lease variations, supporting negotiations and preparing documentation so your lease remains legally enforceable, lender compliant, and fit for the future.

title: Leasehold Reform & Commonhold  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Leasehold law is undergoing significant reform. The Leasehold and Freehold Reform Act 2024 (LAFRA) introduced major changes aimed at making leasehold ownership fairer, simpler, and more transparent. Whether you’re a leaseholder, freeholder, or developer, we’ll help you make sense of the reforms.

title: Licence for Alterations | Moonstone Advocates
description: Thinking of making changes to your leasehold flat? You’ll need formal permission from your landlord before starting any work. This is called a licence for alterations. We’ll take the stress out of the legal side, so you can focus on planning your project. That starts with a clear explanation of what your lease says, what consents you’ll need, and what rights your landlord has.

title: Right to Manage | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you’re unhappy with how your building is run or want more say in day-to-day decisions, the Right to Manage (RTM) gives flat owners a no-fault statutory right to apply to take over the management of their leasehold block of flats from the landlord. If you meet the criteria, you can apply to manage your block. We’ll guide you through the entire process, from setting up the RTM company to serving the legal notice. What’s included is below.

title: Title Splits and Creation of New Leases  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you own a building with multiple flats that are all held under one freehold title, we can help you split the title and grant long leases for each flat. This gives each flat a separate legal identity, making your property easier to manage, sell, or refinance.

description: Resolve property disputes with confidence. Our Real Estate Litigation team provides clear, practical advice and tailored strategies to protect your interests.

We deal with complex legal issues every day, but we always stay focused on what matters most to you. Your objectives guide our strategy.

title: Telecoms  | Moonstone Advocates
description: The Electronic Communications Code gives telecom operators significant powers. They may demand access to your land, seek rent reductions, or delay redevelopment plans. This legal framework can be frustrating and complex. We act exclusively for landowners and occupiers across Uganda. Our role is to protect your property rights, secure fair commercial terms, and safeguard the long term value of your assets. Whether you are a private landowner, occupier, commercial developer or portfolio manager, we deal with these issues every day while staying focused on what matters most to you.

title: Asset and Estate Management  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Managing your property assets doesn’t need to be complicated. description: We help landlords and tenants across Yorkshire and the UK navigate commercial leases with clarity and confidence. title: Commercial | Moonstone Advocates
description: Clear, practical commercial law advice tailored to your business. We take time to understand your goals and help you move forward with confidence.

title: Commercial dispute resolution | Moonstone Advocates
description: Commercial disputes can put pressure on your business. Get clear, practical advice to resolve disputes quickly and protect your commercial interests.

title: Banking & Financial Disputes | Moonstone Advocates
description: Banking and financial disputes can put significant pressure on your business. Whether you're a corporate borrower seeking advice about the terms of your funding agreements or a lender looking to enforce your security, we can support you. We have a wealth of experience in financial dispute litigation and a strong understanding of the regulatory and commercial context these disputes often sit within. By combining legal expertise with practical commercial insight, we help you protect your position and move forward with confidence.

title: Charity Proceedings and Trustee Disputes  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Disputes involving charities and trustees can be complex, sensitive, and time critical. Whether you're dealing with a disagreement between trustees, uncertainty over the interpretation of your governing documents, or an investigation by the Charity Commission, it’s important to have clear and practical advice from the outset. Our experienced team can help you understand your position, manage risk, and find the most effective way forward, whilst protecting the interests and reputation of your charity.

title: Contract Claims | Moonstone Advocates
description: Contracts are key to the operation of businesses. Whether agreed in writing or formed through verbal discussions, contracts create rights and obligations that businesses rely on every day. Do you have a claim for breach of contract from one of your suppliers? Or are you facing an allegation of breach of contract? Our team can work with you to assess the most suitable remedy in the circumstances.

title: Defamation, Privacy, Media & Reputation Management | Moonstone Advocates
description: Your reputation is one of your most valuable assets. Whether you're dealing with false allegations, damaging online content, or unwanted media attention, taking swift action can be crucial. We will work with you to take action to protect your reputation and prevent the publication of false statements. Our team can work alongside your public relations and crisis management teams to support you, when you need it most.

title: Employment Disputes | Moonstone Advocates
description: When an employee breaches your trust, the impact can extend far beyond the workplace. Whether a former employee is breaching restrictive covenants, misusing confidential information, or acting in a way that threatens your business interests, taking early action is essential. We work with businesses to take preventative action to protect valuable assets and advise on how to recover any losses suffered.

title: Injunctions | Moonstone Advocates
description: When urgent action is needed, an injunction can provide immediate legal protection. An injunction is a court order that requires a party to take a specific action or stop doing a specific act. In many cases, an injunction can prevent further loss, protect valuable assets, or preserve your position whilst a dispute is being resolved. We have extensive experience securing injunctions. By giving clear, practical advice, from the outset we work closely with you to understand your need and to protect your interests.

title: Intellectual Property Disputes | Moonstone Advocates
description: Protecting your intellectual property is essential to protecting the value of your business. From your brand and trade secrets to the knowledge, processes, and innovations that set you apart, these assets play a key role in your success. If someone copies, misuses, or discloses your intellectual property, the impact can be harmful to your business. We’ll act quickly to help you protect your rights, safeguard your reputation and minimise disruption to your business.

title: Judicial Review and Public Procurement Challenges  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Public bodies make decisions that can have a significant impact on your business, from contract awards to planning decisions. If a decision affects you adversely, we'll help you assess your options and develop the right strategy. Whether that involves challenging the decision through a formal process or exploring alternative dispute resolution, we'll work with you to protect your interests and achieve the best possible outcome.

title: Partnership Disputes  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Do you operate a general partnership or a limited liability partnership and is there a dispute between your partners? Partnership disputes can be complex to navigate and can have a considerable impact on the operation of your business. We can guide you through a partnership dispute, acknowledging the commercial context in which the dispute sits, and support you at each stage to find a satisfactory outcome.

title: Professional Negligence | Moonstone Advocates
description: When you place your trust in a professional, you expect them to provide advice and services to the standard required of their profession. When they fail to do so and that failure causes financial loss, the consequences can be significant for you and your business. We help businesses pursue claims against a wide range of professionals, including accountants, surveyors, architects, brokers and solicitors. We'll review the circumstances of your case, explain your options clearly and work with you to seek to recover the losses you've suffered.

title: Shareholder Disputes  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Disagreements between shareholders can arise in any type of business. Whether the dispute concerns the direction of the company, the distribution of profits, or allegations of unfair conduct, shareholder disputes can be highly disruptive. If not resolved a shareholder dispute may threaten the viability of a business itself. We provide clear and strategic advice with regard to the bigger commercial picture to reach a resolution.

title: Distribution Agreements | Moonstone Advocates
description: We draft and negotiate distribution agreements that balance commercial opportunity with strong legal protection. From appointment structures and pricing frameworks to performance standards, compliance, brand control and exit planning, we make sure your agreement reflects how your distribution network works in practice.

title: Franchise Agreements | Moonstone Advocates
description: Franchising can drive rapid business growth. When structured properly, it creates an opportunity for both franchisor and franchisee, but the legal framework must be clear, balanced, and commercially sound from the start. We advise on franchise agreements, supporting both franchisors and franchisees with practical, strategic legal advice.

title: Manufacturing Agreements | Moonstone Advocates
description: We draft and negotiate manufacturing agreements that set clear terms for how goods will be produced. That includes specifications, quality standards, delivery timescales, and pricing. Whether you’re a manufacturer or a business outsourcing production, we’ll make sure your agreement gives you certainty, manages risk, and keeps your supply arrangements running smoothly.

title: Software as a Service (SaaS) Agreements | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you provide software on a subscription basis, your contract needs to work as hard as you do. A strong Software as a Service agreement protects your intellectual property, manages risk, and sets clear expectations with your users from day one. We draft SaaS agreements that reflect how your product actually operates. That includes hosting, support, updates, data use and payment terms. You get a contract that supports your growth, not one that holds you back.

title: Supply Contracts  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Every business relies on suppliers. Whether you manufacture products, provide services, or operate in the trades, your supply contracts shape your risk, cash flow, and reputation. A clear, well drafted supply agreement protects your position, sets expectations, and keeps commercial relationships on track. If you need support with a new or existing supply contract, we can help.

title: Terms & Conditions  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Your terms and conditions protect your business every time you sell goods or provide services. They define responsibilities, manage risk, and reduce the chance of disputes. Clear, properly incorporated terms give you certainty and confidence, so you can focus on running your business, not resolving avoidable problems. If you would like to review or update your terms and conditions, we can assist you.

title: Corporate | Moonstone Advocates

title: Corporate Governance  | Moonstone Advocates

title: Corporate Reorganisation | Moonstone Advocates
description: Corporate reorganisations take many forms, and we have the experience to manage them effectively. Working closely with your tax and accounting advisers, as well as specialists across Moonstone, we provide joined-up advice to plan and deliver strategic restructurings on time and within budget.

title: Private Equity and Venture Capital  | Moonstone Advocates
description: We work with private equity sponsors, venture capital firms, founders and management teams at every stage of the deal cycle. Whether you’re leading or participating in a buy-out, raising growth capital, or selling to private equity, we provide clear, pragmatic advice to help transactions progress smoothly.

title: Share Option and Incentive Scheme  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Rewarding your team in the right way can drive long-term business success. We help founders and business owners implement share schemes that attract and retain talent, while protecting shareholder value and keeping control where it belongs. From tax-advantaged options to bespoke growth and phantom schemes, we will work with your tax advisers to help you implement a structure that works for your people and your plans.

title: Strategic M&A and Joint Ventures  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Buying, selling, expanding, or partnering with another business is a big step, and it pays to have the right legal support. We’re here to guide you through mergers, acquisitions, and joint ventures with clear advice and a sharp commercial focus. Whether you’re a first-time buyer, growing through acquisition, or entering a new partnership, we’ll make sure your deal is structured to succeed with commercially relevant support.

title: Data protection & information | Moonstone Advocates
description: Protect your organisation with expert data protection and information law advice. We help you manage personal data, meet ICO requirements and reduce risk.

title: Protecting your data, protecting your organisation | Moonstone Advocates
description: We take the time to understand how your organisation works and what data you handle. That insight means we can shape our advice around your needs, whether you’re responding to a request, reviewing a privacy notice or planning a new project involving personal data.

title: Tailored data protection support  | Moonstone Advocates
description: We offer flexible information law training packages to help your organisation stay compliant and in control. Whether you're just starting out or strengthening what you already have, we’ll make sure you’ve got the right level of support at every stage. Every package is built around your organisation and the level of support you need. We take time to understand how your business operates, the risks you face, and what matters most to you, so the advice you get is practical, relevant and easy to apply.

title: Debt recovery | Moonstone Advocates
description: Recover unpaid debts quickly with expert debt recovery solicitors. We protect your cash flow and resolve disputes commercially, often without court.

title: Debt Recovery Support | Moonstone Advocates
description: Late payment damages cash flow. Unpaid invoices drain time, energy and focus. If your customers are promising payment but not delivering, it is time to take control. We agree a clear plan with you at the outset and tailor our recovery methods to suit your business model. Our approach is strategic and cost effective. We offer flexible pricing structures. This may include a model where our fees are calculated as a percentage of the sums recovered, depending on the type and volume of debt.

title: Employment & HR | Moonstone Advocates
description: Employment law and HR support for employers. Get practical advice on settlement agreements, tribunals, disciplinaries, compliance and more.

title: Breach of Contract and Unlawful Deduction from Wages for Employers | Moonstone Advocates
description: When employment contracts are broken or wages are withheld without clear consent, things can escalate quickly. We help employers prevent disputes from arising, and act fast to resolve any breach of contract or unlawful deduction claims when they do. Our employment solicitors work with businesses of all sizes to draft compliant contracts, include lawful pay clauses, and resolve pay-related issues confidently and efficiently.

title: Commercial Agents | Moonstone Advocates
description: Working with self-employed agents can be a smart way to grow your sales network without the complexity of employment law. But when the Commercial Agents Regulations apply, they bring rights, responsibilities, and risks you need to manage from the start. We help businesses across Uganda structure agency relationships that are clear, compliant, and commercially sound. Whether you’re drafting new agreements or managing termination risk, we’ll guide you through every step.

title: Contracts of Employment  | Moonstone Advocates
description: A clear, well-drafted contract is one of the best ways to protect your business and support your team. We help employers get their employment terms right from day one, in line with the Employment Rights Act 1996. From written particulars to post-termination restrictions, we’ll make sure your contracts are compliant, enforceable and tailored to how your business runs.

title: Directors’ Service Agreements | Moonstone Advocates
description: Directors carry unique responsibilities, so their contracts need to do more than cover the basics. We draft, review, and negotiate Directors’ Service Agreements that reflect board-level duties, protect business interests, and meet the standards of the Companies Act 2006. Whether you're appointing a new director or reviewing existing terms, we’ll help you get everything in place with clarity and confidence.

title: Disciplinary Proceedings | Moonstone Advocates
description: Acting on performance or conduct concerns can be difficult. But with the right legal support, you can act quickly, fairly and within the law. We help employers manage disciplinary issues with confidence, reducing the risk of tribunal claims, reputational harm and disruption to morale.

title: Discrimination | Moonstone Advocates
description: Workplace discrimination can happen at any stage of employment. Whether it’s in recruitment, performance management, or dismissal, employers have a legal duty to act fairly. We help businesses prevent and respond to discrimination issues under the Equality Act 2010. If a claim is made, the financial and reputational risks are high. Tribunal awards are uncapped and may include injury to feelings and uplifts for procedural failures.

title: Employment Policies and Staff Handbooks | Moonstone Advocates
description: A clear staff handbook sets the tone for how you work. It gives your team confidence, underpins workplace relationships, and protects your business. While contracts are harder to change, a well-written handbook can be updated quickly to reflect the law and best practice. We’ll draft, review, and defend your employment policies so you can lead with clarity and stay legally secure.

title: Flexible Working | Moonstone Advocates
description: Flexible working includes changes to hours, working location or patterns. That might mean part-time, compressed hours, hybrid working, or remote roles. In the UK, employees can make two statutory requests a year from day one of employment. Employers must respond within two months. We help you manage flexible working requests fairly, lawfully, and in a way that supports your business.

title: Gig Economy  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If your business relies on flexible or freelance talent, you’re part of the gig economy. It’s fast-moving and full of opportunity, but it’s also tightly regulated. As the laws on status, tax, working time, holiday, discrimination, health and safety, and data privacy are complex. From status audits to IR35 to training your HR team, we help employers get it right.

title: Grievances | Moonstone Advocates
description: If an employee raises a grievance, you're legally required to investigate and respond. Get it wrong, and you risk tribunal claims, increased compensation, and reputational damage. The Employment Rights Act 1996 and ACAS Code require fair, prompt procedures; breaches risk 25% uplifts and uncapped damages. We’ll help you manage complaints fairly and decisively, with advice that protects your business and your people.

title: Immigration  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Staying on top of the UK’s fast‑changing business immigration regime is crucial to recruit and retain global talent. We work with employers of all sizes to make sure your systems, policies, and sponsorships are legally sound, protecting your organisation. Our advice helps you stay compliant.

title: IR35 | Moonstone Advocates
description: IR35 (also known as the off-payroll working rules) affects whether contractors are treated as employees for tax purposes. If it applies, PAYE and National Insurance must be deducted. Getting it wrong can mean tax penalties, reputational damage, and employment disputes. We help you stay on the right side of the rules.

title: Managing Sickness Absence  | Moonstone Advocates
description: When sickness absence is left unmanaged, it affects productivity, disrupts teams, and creates legal risk. We provide clear, compliant support from policy design to capability procedures and litigation.

title: Performance Management  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Addressing under-performance can be tricky, leading to legal complexities. You need to keep things fair, protect your business, and follow employment law and ACAS guidance. If it’s not handled properly, you risk grievances, discrimination claims, or unfair dismissal cases. We can deliver clear, confident support at every stage of the performance management process.

title: Recruitment  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Hiring the right people carries legal risk. It’s a process to get right from the start. From job ad to offer letter, our employment team helps you recruit fairly, lawfully, and confidently. We’ll help you attract great candidates while reducing risk and protecting your reputation.

title: Redundancy  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Redundancy can be lawful, but only if the need is genuine and the process is fair. Get it wrong and you risk claims for unfair dismissal, discrimination or protective awards. We help you manage redundancy with care, clarity, and legal confidence, from initial planning to final decisions.

title: Restrictive Covenants | Moonstone Advocates
description: When key staff leave, your business needs protection. Restrictive covenants are the legal tools that stop former employees from poaching clients, taking team members or using confidential information against you. We’ll help you draft, audit and enforce the right clauses, ones that protect your interests without risking enforceability.

title: Restructuring  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Restructuring your business can bring clarity and growth, but only if it’s done right. It demands careful planning and strict legal compliance. Whether you’re responding to new tech, efficiency drives or M&A activity, we’ll help you realign teams and roles to meet strategic goals. By supporting employers with early planning to final outcomes, we reduce risk and manage change lawfully and fairly.

title: Settlement Agreements and Protected Conversations | Moonstone Advocates
description: Settlement agreements offer a clean break for employers when it's time to part ways. Protected conversations give you the space to talk about exit terms without the fear of a Tribunal claim for unfair dismissal. When agreed, a compliant settlement agreement waives employment claims in exchange for consideration. We guide you through every stage confidently, lawfully, and with the right protection in place.

title: Transfer of Undertakings (TUPE) | Moonstone Advocates
description: Whether you’re buying a business, outsourcing services or managing a contract change, TUPE may apply and with it come specific legal obligations to your employees. TUPE protects employees’ terms and continuity, and most transfer-related dismissals risk being automatically unfair. Employers must inform and, where required, consult affected staff, and non-compliance can lead to compensation. We’ll guide you through the process clearly and pragmatically, from early assessment through to post-transfer support.

title: Tribunal Representation  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Dealing with a claim against your business? When a claim lands, time matters. Getting expert legal advice straight away helps you meet tight deadlines, manage risk, and stay in control. We’ll guide you from ET1 to final hearing, combining practical advice with robust representation to give you the best chance of a positive outcome.

title: Unfair and Wrongful Dismissal  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you’ve dismissed an employee and they’re bringing a claim, we’ll help you respond fast and defend your position. Unfair dismissal happens when someone is let go without a valid reason or a fair process, usually after two years of service. Wrongful dismissal is about breaching the terms of a contract, often by not giving proper notice or pay in lieu. Whether the issue is unfair dismissal, wrongful dismissal or both, our team will guide you through the process clearly and keep risks to a minimum.

title: Whistleblowing  | Moonstone Advocates
description: When an employee raises concerns about wrongdoing, it’s vital to act quickly and carefully. Whistleblowing, or making a protected disclosure under the Public Interest Disclosure Act 1998, protects workers reporting serious wrongdoing. Mishandling a protected disclosure can lead to costly claims, serious reputational damage, and regulatory scrutiny. We’ll guide you through the process with practical, clear advice at every step.

title: Working Time Regulations | Moonstone Advocates
description: Need help managing working hours or holiday pay? We support employers with clear, practical advice on the Working Time Regulations 1998. Whether you’re dealing with shift workers, irregular hours, or backdated holiday claims, we’ll help you reduce enforcement risk, protect well-being, and meet your legal duties while keeping your business moving and avoiding costly Tribunal claims.

title: Insolvency & recovery | Moonstone Advocates
description: Insolvency and recovery solicitors providing clear, commercial advice on business insolvency, bankruptcy, administration, liquidation and recovery.

title: Claims against Directors  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Most UK companies operate as limited companies, but limited liability does not remove all personal risk for directors. When a business enters insolvency, directors may still be held accountable for how they managed the company beforehand. Decisions made in the lead up to insolvency are often closely reviewed, particularly where creditors may have been affected. We support directors and Insolvency Practitioners with clear, practical advice to resolve disputes and protect interests at every stage.

title: Corporate Recovery  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Financial pressure can affect even strong businesses. Short term cash flow issues, creditor pressure, or market changes can put your company at risk. The right legal advice can protect your position and give your business time to recover. We regularly advise businesses on Company Voluntary Arrangements (CVAs), Administration, Receivership, and Liquidation. Helping you understand your options clearly, we act quickly when urgent decisions are needed.

title: Director Disqualification Proceedings | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you are a director of an insolvent company, you may face investigation by a Liquidator or the Secretary of State. Disqualification proceedings can have serious consequences for your future role in business. We provide clear, practical advice to help you understand the risks, respond effectively, and move forward with confidence.

title: Intellectual property | Moonstone Advocates
description: Intellectual property solicitors helping brands, creators and businesses protect, manage and defend the ideas, assets and innovations that drive growth.

title: Copyright | Moonstone Advocates
description: Copyright protects your original creative work, from written content and artwork to software, designs, video, and marketing materials. It is a valuable business asset. We help you understand what you own, how to use it commercially, and how to protect it properly.

title: Design Rights  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Design rights protect the appearance of a product, from its shape and surface decoration to patterns and packaging. If you have created something distinctive, you need to make sure it is properly protected. We help you secure and enforce your design rights in the UK and internationally. Whether you are registering a new design, relying on unregistered rights, or dealing with copying, we will guide you clearly and confidently.

title: Intellectual Property Enforcement | Moonstone Advocates
description: Your intellectual property is a valuable commercial asset. When someone copies your brand, product or content, it can damage your reputation and undermine your investment. We take swift, practical action to enforce your intellectual property rights. If you believe your IP is being infringed, please contact us, and we can assist you.

title: Trade Marks | Moonstone Advocates
description: Your trade mark protects what sets your business apart. From names and logos to colours and slogans, it is how customers recognise and trust you. We can support you at every stage of brand protection, from first search to long term portfolio management.

title: Landlord Financing Conveyancing
description: Secure landlord finance with confidence. Our specialist conveyancing team supports landlords and lenders with clear, efficient legal advice.

title: Planning | Moonstone Advocates
description: Secure the right planning outcome with clear, commercially focused planning advice for developers, landowners, investors and public bodies.

title: Strategic Planning and Development Advice | Moonstone Advocates
description: Securing the right planning outcome is fundamental to the viability of a development project. We pride ourselves on delivering clear, commercially strategic and pragmatic advice; providing robust strategies to enable our clients to effectively navigate the planning system and enable deliverable, financeable schemes. Working closely with you, we deliver a personal and cost efficient service, keeping you fully informed so you can make commercially sound decisions that maximise planning opportunities and secure the best possible outcome.

title: Real estate | Moonstone Advocates
description: Real Estate solicitors supporting landlords, tenants, lenders and property owners with practical advice on acquisitions, disposals, development and finance.

title: Regulatory | Moonstone Advocates
description: Facing a regulatory investigation? Get clear legal advice and expert representation for health and safety, fraud, tax and regulatory matters.

title: For individuals | Moonstone Advocates
description: Expert legal advice for individuals and families. Our solicitors can help with life’s important moments, providing clear, practical support when you need it most.

title: Contentious probate | Moonstone Advocates
description: Expert contentious probate advice for will, trust, and inheritance disputes. We’ll help you protect your interests and find the right solution.

title: Claims under the Inheritance Provision for Family and Dependants Act 1975 | Moonstone Advocates
description: English law is based on the principle of testamentary freedom. This means they can leave their estate to whoever they choose. They can also exclude certain people from their Will, including children, a spouse or a civil partner. However, that freedom is not absolute. The Inheritance Provision for Family and Dependants Act 1975 allows certain categories of people to bring a claim against an estate if the Will, or the intestacy rules where there is no Will, fails to make reasonable financial provision for them. We advise on both bringing and defending Inheritance Act claims.

title: Disputing the validity of a Will  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you have concerns about the validity of a Will, you may be able to challenge it through a contested probate claim, it is important to act quickly. A Will can be challenged where there are issues such as lack of capacity, undue influence, or failure to comply with legal formalities. We provide clear, practical advice to help you understand your options.

title: Executor and Trustee Disputes | Moonstone Advocates
description: When someone dies, the people appointed to deal with their estate carry significant responsibility. Executors and trustees must act in the best interests of the estate and its beneficiaries. When disagreements arise, or concerns are raised about how an estate or trust is being managed, it can quickly become stressful and complex. We help resolve executor and trustee disputes with clear, practical advice. Whether you’re a beneficiary worried about how an estate is being handled, or an executor facing allegations about your conduct, we’ll guide you through your options.

title: Dispute resolution | Moonstone Advocates
description: Resolve commercial and personal disputes with confidence. Our dispute resolution solicitors provide clear advice and practical solutions.

title: Banking & Financial Disputes | Moonstone Advocates
description: If your insurer has refused to pay a claim on your insurance policy, or you've been mis-sold a financial product by a broker or financial adviser, we can help you seek redress. We support individuals with complaints to regulators like the Financial Ombudsman Service and issuing proceedings to recover losses when needed.

title: Contract Claims | Moonstone Advocates
description: Contracts can be written or verbal and cover a wide range of arrangements, from the supply of goods to the delivery of services. When a contract is breached, the impact can be significant. Whether you're dealing with lost income, business disruption, or a claim made against you, we'll help you understand your position and take practical steps to protect your interests as efficiently and effectively as possible.

title: Defamation, Privacy, Media & Reputation Management  | Moonstone Advocates
description: We know how much your reputation matters, and the impact of false or harmful statements can be long-lasting. We’ll work with you to understand the implications and act quickly to prevent further harm, whether that’s by taking legal action, seeking the removal of online content, or managing the response alongside PR and crisis teams. We’ve supported clients through it all, from social media storms to national press coverage.

title: Employment Disputes | Moonstone Advocates
description: Are you being pursued by your former employer for alleged breaches of your contract of employment? Or do you have a claim against your employer for breach of contract? Our specialist team regularly acts for employees in claims involving miss-use of confidential information, intellectual property, and breaches of restrictive covenants. We’ll give you clear advice on a way forward.

title: Injunctions  | Moonstone Advocates
description: When urgent action is needed, an injunction can provide immediate legal protection. An injunction is a court order that requires a party to take a specific action or stop doing a specific act. In many cases, an injunction can prevent further loss, protect valuable assets, or preserve your position whilst a dispute is being resolved. We have extensive experience securing injunctions. By giving clear, practical advice, from the outset we work closely with you to understand your need and to protect your interests.

title: Judicial Review  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Public bodies make decisions that can significantly affect your life. If you believe a decision was made unlawfully, you may be able to challenge it through judicial review. Our experienced team helps clients hold public authorities to account, including local councils, the NHS, and statutory bodies.

title: Professional Negligence Claims  | Moonstone Advocates
description: When professionals make mistakes, the consequences can be serious. If their failure to meet expected standards has adversely affected you, we can help. We help navigate the complexities of a professional negligence claim against a range of different professionals (including accountants, surveyors, architects, and solicitors) and obtain redress for you.

title: Employment | Moonstone Advocates
description: Facing a problem at work? Our Kampala employment solicitors provide clear advice on dismissal, discrimination, settlement agreements and more.

title: Breach of Contract and Unlawful Deduction from Wages Claims | Moonstone Advocates
description: If your employer hasn't paid you what you're owed, we can help. Whether it's missing wages, unpaid bonuses, or unlawful deductions, you’ve got the right to take action, and we’re here to guide you through it. We work with employees across all sectors to challenge contract breaches and recover what’s due. From your first payslip to your last day, your employer must stick to the terms of your contract. If they don’t, you may have a claim.

title: Contracts of Employment | Moonstone Advocates
description: Starting a new job should feel exciting, not overwhelming. But if your contract’s unclear, incomplete or unfair, it can affect everything from your hours to your notice rights. That’s where we come in. We’re here to help you understand exactly what you’re signing, spot risks early, and negotiate terms that work for you. Whether you're reviewing a new offer or tackling changes mid-role, we’ll protect your position from induction to exit.

title: Disciplinary Proceedings | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you’ve been called into a disciplinary meeting, it’s normal to feel anxious. Whether it’s about conduct or performance, the stakes can be high as your job, reputation, and future could all be affected. We’re here to help you stay calm, understand your rights, and respond in the right way. Employers must follow fair processes under the ACAS Code. If they don’t, we’ll make sure it’s challenged and help you achieve the best possible outcome.

title: Discrimination & Equality  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you’re being treated unfairly at work because of who you are, you don’t have to put up with it. Discrimination is upsetting, isolating, and often hard to talk about, but you're not alone, and you have rights. We’re here to help you understand your rights, challenge unfair treatment, and secure fair outcomes with clear advice and practical support at every stage. Whether you want to raise a grievance, seek changes, or bring a claim, we’ll guide you every step of the way.

title: Employment Tribunal Claims | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you’ve been treated unfairly at work, the Employment Tribunal can help you seek justice. Whether it’s unfair dismissal, discrimination, unpaid wages or breach of contract, we’re here to guide you through every step of the process, from ACAS conciliation right through to hearings and appeals. Need to challenge what’s happened at work? We can help you take the right action.

title: Flexible Working  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Whether you're looking for part-time hours, hybrid working, or something more tailored, flexible working is your right from day one in a job. You can make up to two statutory requests a year. It just needs to be in writing. Your employer must consult with you and give you a decision within two months. They can only say no for specific business reasons set out in law. We’ll help you request the setup you need and make sure your rights are respected.

title: Holiday Pay | Moonstone Advocates
description: Paid annual leave is a legal right under the Working Time Regulations 1998. Most workers get at least 5.6 weeks’ paid holiday, often including bank holidays. Holiday pay should reflect your normal earnings, not just basic salary. That includes regular overtime, commission, and bonuses. Holiday pay should be fair and accurate from day one. Employers cannot underpay or unreasonably refuse properly requested leave. If this is the case for you, we can help.

title: Redundancy  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Being put at risk of redundancy is never easy. Whether you’re facing individual consultation or part of a collective process, your rights matter. Our team is here to check how fair the process really is, challenge poor decisions, and make sure you’re treated properly from start to finish. If you’re unsure where you stand, we’ll help you work it out.

title: Restrictive Covenants | Moonstone Advocates
description: Leaving a job or workplace doesn’t always mean cutting ties. Many contracts include restrictive covenants that try to limit what you can do after you leave. They might stop you from joining a competitor, contacting clients, or using certain information. Some are fair and others aren’t. They’re enforceable only if reasonably necessary to protect legitimate business interests. If you’re unsure where you stand, we’ll help you assess the risks, understand your rights, and resolve disputes.

title: Settlement Agreements | Moonstone Advocates
description: A Settlement Agreement is your legal exit from employment. It usually includes compensation in return for giving up your right to bring claims. UK law requires independent legal advice from a qualified employment solicitor to ensure you understand the terms and statutory requirements. That’s where we come in. We make sure you know exactly what you’re signing and what you could achieve with negotiation.

title: Unfair, Constructive, and Wrongful Dismissal  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Losing your job unfairly or in breach of your contract is more than just stressful, it can be life-changing. Whether you’ve been dismissed without reason, forced out by poor treatment, or denied your contractual rights, you don’t have to face it alone. We help you challenge dismissal decisions, secure fair settlements, and bring claims when needed. If your dismissal feels wrong, speak to us today.

title: Whistleblowing | Moonstone Advocates
description: Speaking up about serious wrongdoing at work takes courage. If you’ve raised serious wrongdoing (“protected disclosures”) or are thinking about it, you have important rights. UK law protects whistleblowers from dismissal, demotion, bullying, and other negative treatment. Our job is to help you stay protected, make informed decisions, and act quickly if you’ve already faced retaliation. If you're unsure where you stand, speak to our whistleblowing solicitors for clear, confidential advice.

title: Workplace Grievances  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If something’s gone wrong at work, you have the right to raise it. Whether it’s bullying, discrimination, unfair treatment, or whistleblowing, your employer must follow a proper process, and under the ACAS code. That means a fair hearing, the right to be accompanied, and a clear outcome. If they don’t follow the rules or if things escalate, we’re here to protect your position and guide you through it.

title: Family | Moonstone Advocates
description: Family law solicitors supporting you through divorce, separation, financial settlements and child arrangements. Clear advice tailored to your future.

title: Children  | Moonstone Advocates
description: When a relationship ends, your role as a parent continues. That’s why we focus on helping you find a constructive way forward. Whether you're trying to agree on where your children live, secure financial support, or make important decisions about their future, we’re here with clear, practical advice.

title: Relationship Breakdown | Moonstone Advocates
description: Going through a separation or divorce is never easy, but we’re here to make the legal side as clear and manageable as possible. Whether you're facing complex finances or simply want to understand your rights, we’ll guide you through every stage with straightforward advice, tailored to your situation.

title: Relationship Planning | Moonstone Advocates
description: Thinking about moving in together, buying a home, or getting married? We can help you put the right agreement in place to protect your finances and avoid future uncertainty. Whether you’re at the start of a relationship or well into it, we will make sure everything’s fair, clear, and built around your needs.

title: Landlord financing conveyancing | Moonstone Advocates
description: Secure landlord finance with confidence. Our specialist conveyancing team supports landlords and lenders with clear, efficient legal advice.

title: Residential Conveyancing | Moonstone Advocates
description: Buying or selling a home is a big step, and it can feel overwhelming. We’re here to keep things simple and stress-free. We work quickly and clearly, with direct access whenever you need an update. We use smart systems to cut delays, but it’s the personal support that makes the real difference. Whether you're a first-time buyer, remortgaging, or transferring property to someone else, we'll help you move forward confidently.

title: Leasehold enfranchisement & management | Moonstone Advocates
description: Expert leasehold enfranchisement solicitors providing lease extensions, leasehold advice and property management support for landlords and leaseholders.

title: Buying your Freehold  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Buying the freehold of a leasehold property can give you greater control, long-term security and clarity over costs. Whether you own a leasehold flat or leasehold house, there are legal routes available to help you secure the freehold. As members of the Association of Leasehold Enfranchisement Practitioners and The Property Institute, we have recognised experience and practical knowledge to support you through the process with confidence.

title: Extending your Lease  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If your lease is starting to run down, now is the time to act. Letting it drop below 80 years could significantly increase the cost to extend it. We can help you secure a longer lease that protects the value of your home and gives you peace of mind.

title: Ground Rent Issues and Lease Variations  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Ground rent provisions and lease terms that no longer meet modern lender requirements can create real barriers for leaseholders and landlords. Issues such as escalating ground rent or defective lease clauses can affect mortgageability, value and future sales. We provide clear guidance on lease variations, supporting negotiations and preparing documentation so your lease remains legally enforceable, lender compliant, and fit for the future.

title: Leasehold Reform & Commonhold  | Moonstone Advocates
description: Leasehold law is undergoing significant reform. The Leasehold and Freehold Reform Act 2024 (LAFRA) introduced major changes aimed at making leasehold ownership fairer, simpler, and more transparent. Whether you’re a leaseholder, freeholder, or developer, we’ll help you make sense of the reforms.

title: Licence for Alterations | Moonstone Advocates
description: Thinking of making changes to your leasehold flat? You’ll need formal permission from your landlord before starting any work. This is called a licence for alterations. We’ll take the stress out of the legal side, so you can focus on planning your project. That starts with a clear explanation of what your lease says, what consents you’ll need, and what rights your landlord has.

title: Right to Manage | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you’re unhappy with how your building is run or want more say in day-to-day decisions, the Right to Manage (RTM) gives flat owners a no-fault statutory right to apply to take over the management of their leasehold block of flats from the landlord. If you meet the criteria, you can apply to manage your block. We’ll guide you through the entire process, from setting up the RTM company to serving the legal notice. What’s included is below.

title: Title Splits and Creation of New Leases  | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you own a building with multiple flats that are all held under one freehold title, we can help you split the title and grant long leases for each flat. This gives each flat a separate legal identity, making your property easier to manage, sell, or refinance.

title: Private wealth & succession | Moonstone Advocates
description: Private Wealth & Succession solicitors offering expert advice on Wills, Trusts, estate planning and administration. Plan for the future with confidence.

title: Lasting Powers of Attorney | Moonstone Advocates
description: Whilst no one wants to think about losing mental capacity, it is an increasing problem for our ageing population. Our expert Private Wealth & Succession team can help give you peace of mind through advice on and preparation of Lasting Powers of Attorney (LPAs).

title: Lifetime Trusts | Moonstone Advocates
description: If you want to protect your assets and plan for the future, we can help. A lifetime trust can be a smart way to pass wealth to your loved ones while keeping control. Our team will explain your options and guide you through every step.

title: Making a Will | Moonstone Advocates
description: Making a Will gives you peace of mind and protects the people and things that matter to you. It's the first step in planning your legacy with our experienced Private Wealth & Succession team.
